ddls:
CREATE TABLE "employees" (
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employee */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the employee */,
  "job_title_id" INTEGER /* ID of the job title held by the employee */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department the employee belongs to */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* Date the employee was hired */,
  "resignation_date" TEXT /* Date the employee resigned (if applicable) */,
  "new_hire_training" INTEGER /* Indicates if the employee has completed new hire training */,
  "emergency_contact" TEXT /* Emergency contact information for the employee */,
  "benefits_eligibility" TEXT /* Information about the employee's benefits eligibility */,
  "performance_review_date" TEXT /* Date of the last performance review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_job_title_id FOREIGN KEY ("job_title_id") REFERENCES job_titles ("job_title_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "job_titles" (
  "job_title_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each job title */,
  "job_title_name" TEXT /* Name of the job title */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the job title */,
  "is_management" INTEGER /* Indicates if the job title is a management position */,
  "required_education" TEXT /* Required education level for the job title */,
  "required_experience" INTEGER /* Required years of experience for the job title */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("job_title_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the department */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the manager of the department */,
  "location" TEXT /* Physical location of the department */,
  "budget_allocation" REAL /* Budget allocated to the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_departments_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "compensation_types" (
  "compensation_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each compensation type */,
  "compensation_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the compensation type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the compensation type */,
  "is_taxable" INTEGER /* Indicates if the compensation type is taxable */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of payment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("compensation_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "compensation" (
  "compensation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each compensation record */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee receiving the compensation */,
  "compensation_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the compensation type */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of compensation */,
  "fiscal_year" INTEGER /* Fiscal year the compensation was paid */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Actual payment date */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method (e.g., Direct Deposit, Check) */,
  "tax_deductions" REAL /* Amount of tax deducted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("compensation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compensation_compensation_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("compensation_type_id") REFERENCES compensation_types ("compensation_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compensation_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "appointments" (
  "appointment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each appointment */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee being appointed */,
  "job_title_id" INTEGER /* ID of the job title being appointed to */,
  "appointment_date" TEXT /* Date the appointment started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the appointment ended (if applicable) */,
  "reason_for_change" TEXT /* Reason for the appointment change */,
  "approved_by" TEXT /* Name of the person who approved the appointment change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("appointment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_appointments_job_title_id FOREIGN KEY ("job_title_id") REFERENCES job_titles ("job_title_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_appointments_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vacancies" (
  "vacancy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vacancy */,
  "job_title_id" INTEGER /* ID of the job title with the vacancy */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the vacancy started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the vacancy ended (if applicable) */,
  "reason_for_vacancy" TEXT /* Reason for the vacancy */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the vacancy */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vacancy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vacancies_job_title_id FOREIGN KEY ("job_title_id") REFERENCES job_titles ("job_title_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "salary_ranges" (
  "salary_range_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each salary range */,
  "job_title_id" INTEGER /* ID of the job title with the salary range */,
  "min_salary" REAL /* Minimum salary for the job title */,
  "max_salary" REAL /* Maximum salary for the job title */,
  "fiscal_year" INTEGER /* Fiscal year the salary range applies to */,
  "step_increments" INTEGER /* Number of steps within the salary range */,
  "step_amount" REAL /* Amount of increment per step */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("salary_range_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_salary_ranges_job_title_id FOREIGN KEY ("job_title_id") REFERENCES job_titles ("job_title_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stipend_rates" (
  "stipend_rate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stipend rate */,
  "job_title_id" INTEGER /* ID of the job title with the stipend rate */,
  "stipend_rate" REAL /* Stipend rate for the job title */,
  "fiscal_year" INTEGER /* Fiscal year the stipend rate applies to */,
  "stipend_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of stipend payment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stipend_rate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stipend_rates_job_title_id FOREIGN KEY ("job_title_id") REFERENCES job_titles ("job_title_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, HR personnel) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the system was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, logout) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the user accessed the system */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used (e.g., Desktop, Mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Data contained in the report */,
  "generated_by" TEXT /* User who generated the report */,
  "report_format" TEXT /* Format of the report (e.g., PDF, CSV) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)
